{'sql': 'SELECT 
    cm.FullName AS "maker_full_name",
    cm.Id AS "maker_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ml.Model) AS "number_of_models"
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    cm.FullName;'}

    cm.FullName AS "maker_full_name",
    cm.Id AS "maker_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ml.Model) AS "number_of_models"
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    cm.FullName;

{"sql": "SELECT 
    cm.FullName AS "maker_full_name",
    cm.Id AS "maker_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ml.Model) AS "number_of_models"
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    cm.FullName;"}

SELECT 
    cm.FullName AS "maker_full_name",
    cm.Id AS "maker_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT ml.Model) AS "number_of_models"
FROM 
    car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN 
    model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
GROUP BY 
    cm.Id, cm.FullName
ORDER BY 
    cm.FullName;
